name: Sᴛᴇᴇʟ Bᴀʟʟ Rᴜɴ
description:
[Intro]
Steel Ball Run!

[Verse 1]
With a horse so dope, he's smoking like a--
Horse so dope, he's smoking like a cannon!
Horse so dope, he's smokin' like a--
Jump, dance to Honma's chop!*

[Chorus 1]
Yeah! 
Eighteen-ninety, 10 AM
We start from west to east to find the Steel Ball Run (Yeah!) 
Hope made me spin this world, JoJo
Left to right, we never stop this race! 
You can make your way 
Come to the Steel Ball Run 
Yeah!

[Solos]
Steel Ball Run! 
Steel Ball Run!

[Verse 2]
With a horse so dope, he's smoking like a--
Why shouldn't we win this thing, yeah? (like a cannon!)
Horse so dope, he's smokin' like a--
Hot gun in Steel Ball Run!
How! Pow! Time to get moving
Dance fast and come back and get the lead
Can't play me, there's no time for losing
Follow me, count on SBR!

[Chorus 2]
Yeah! 
Eighteen-ninety, 10 AM
We start from west to east to find the Steel Ball Run (Yeah!) 
Help make me stand with your soul, JoJo 
Looking from left to right, we never stop this race! 
You can make your way 
Come to the Steel Ball Run 
Yeah!
creator: GrandPriest_SonGoku
